name: analysis-flow-basic
description: Skill correctly analyzes a Todo issue and posts structured analysis
expected_behavior: Announces it is using the /senior-developer skill
Runs preflight checks for gh, jq, and auth scopes
Reads issue via gh issue view with --comments flag
Detects status from GitHub Projects (not labels)
Routes to analysis flow for Todo/In Analysis/no status
Presents draft analysis to user BEFORE posting
Analysis includes: What's the issue, Approaches considered, Recommended approach, Risks/open questions
Waits for user confirmation before posting comment
Posts analysis comment via gh issue comment
Updates project fields: Task Type, Size, Estimate
Stops and tells user to say 'develop' when ready — does NOT start development
